summary: Accepted follow-up decision for TASK-051: no deprecated skills, aliases, or backwards compatibility. Rename primary loop skills directly and remove old the old documentation-loop skill name and the old implementation-loop skill name names; if anything breaks, fix it.

accepted_decisions.summary: Do not keep compatibility aliases for the old documentation-loop skill name or the old implementation-loop skill name.
Remove old skill directories and references immediately.
Use only `codewiki-feedback`, `codewiki-documentation`, and `codewiki-implementation` as primary loop skill names.

non_goals: Do not preserve deprecated code paths.
